description: Landscape graphic in DHS/FEMA house style. The left portion is a color photograph of a woman wearing a light-blue polo embroidered with the DHS seal and the word 'FEMA'; she has a lanyard ID and holds a FEMA document with a partially legible phone number. Behind her, blurred, is another person and a counter or office setting. The upper right has the letters 'FEMA' in large bold orange capitals. An orange banner block at right-center holds white bold text: 'Thank you to our FEMA workforce for supporting our nation's communities before, during and after disasters with dedication and resilience.' The hashtag '#5DaysofThanks' is in dark bold text at lower right. The circular DHS seal is at bottom-left. A faint palm or wave motif is visible at lower right.
notable_text: FEMA | Thank you to our FEMA workforce for supporting our nation's communities before, during and after disasters with dedication and resilience. | #5DaysofThanks
